name: Retail Banking Collateral Limit Manager
description: Retail Banking Collateral Limit Manager prices exposure limits and settles transactions; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via SWIFT Gateway to reduce settlement breaks.

steps.name: Order Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize customer profiles from Sanctions Lists; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Generate
steps.description: Execute generate phase for the Self-Verify pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Verify
steps.description: Execute verify phase for the Self-Verify pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Case Management
steps.description: Case Management across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Limit Control
steps.description: Limit Control across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Portfolio Check
steps.description: Portfolio Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Operations Handoff
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to Market Data Feed; return response JSON for the client.
